title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 08 2025
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 08 2025
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 08 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/01/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures continued to decline, but the decrease narrowed. The most-traded I2505 contract closed at 747.5 yuan/mt,down 0.73% for the day. Some traders were reluctant to sell, while others sold at market prices.
